title: ranunculus × variifolius
intro: Ranunculus × variifolius, also known as lesser celandine or pilewort, is a flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides in its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Ranunculus × variifolius include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce swelling and ease pain. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, although it is essential to note that it should be used under the guidance of a qualified healthcare practitioner due to its potential toxicity.
